rubric.description: For each case, submit the prompt to an LLM and collect its word-interpretation.  Score with score_interpretation().
rubric.aggregation: mean_f1 across all cases, plus per-category breakdown.

cases.prompt:
Formula interpretation task.

The formula is: P = VI
Canonical reading: P equals V I

Give ONLY a short phonetic word-interpretation for this formula,
following the style: e im code two, f gravity mass me one me two dont do
(one interpretation per symbol/phoneme, lowercase, space-separated).
Output only the interpretation, nothing else.

cases.canonical: E equals one half m v squared
cases.target_interpretation: e im half em v two
cases.prompt:
Formula interpretation task.

The formula is: E = ½mv²
Canonical reading: E equals one half m v squared

Give ONLY a short phonetic word-interpretation for this formula,
following the style: e im code two, f gravity mass me one me two dont do
(one interpretation per symbol/phoneme, lowercase, space-separated).
Output only the interpretation, nothing else.

Formula interpretation task.

The formula is: P = I²R
Canonical reading: P equals I squared R

Give ONLY a short phonetic word-interpretation for this formula,
following the style: e im code two, f gravity mass me one me two dont do
(one interpretation per symbol/phoneme, lowercase, space-separated).
Output only the interpretation, nothing else.

cases.canonical: Q equals Delta m c squared
cases.target_interpretation: cue im delta em code two
cases.prompt:
Formula interpretation task.

The formula is: Q = Δmc²
Canonical reading: Q equals Delta m c squared

Give ONLY a short phonetic word-interpretation for this formula,
following the style: e im code two, f gravity mass me one me two dont do
(one interpretation per symbol/phoneme, lowercase, space-separated).
Output only the interpretation, nothing else.

cases.canonical: a to the n is congruent to b to the n mod m
cases.target_interpretation: a n bee n mod em
cases.prompt:
Formula interpretation task.

The formula is: aⁿ ≡ bⁿ (mod m)
Canonical reading: a to the n is congruent to b to the n mod m

Give ONLY a short phonetic word-interpretation for this formula,
following the style: e im code two, f gravity mass me one me two dont do
(one interpretation per symbol/phoneme, lowercase, space-separated).
Output only the interpretation, nothing else.
